ingredients.name: HANAGATAYA Tokyo Station South (Bento)
ingredients.address: 南通路 JR Tokyo Station, １Ｆ, 1 Chome-9-1 Marunouchi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0005, Japan

ingredients.name: Sendagaya Station
ingredients.entityContext: The station where Taki spots Mitsuha on a passing train and races off to chase her — a bittersweet near-miss that sets up the film's Tokyo search sequence. The NTT Docomo Yoyogi Building (the clock-tower skyscraper) looms visibly above.

ingredients.name: Ajidokoro Furukawa
ingredients.entityContext: A Hida-Furukawa eatery featured when Taki and friends stop to eat and ask locals about Itomori during their search.

ingredients.name: polyphony
ingredients.type: オーガニック レストラン
categories: オーガニック レストラン
ingredients.address: ベルビー四谷 1階, 1 Chome-21-2 Wakaba, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0011, Japan

ingredients.name: HANAGATAYA Tokyo Yaesu South Exit
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒100-0005 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−9−1 JR Tokyo Station, １階 八重洲南口改札内

ingredients.name: Starbucks Coffee - Shibuya Tsutaya 2F
ingredients.localName: スターバックス コーヒー SHIBUYA TSUTAYA 2F店

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Shinjuku Yasukuni Ave.
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 新宿駅靖国通り店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 小松ビル 1F, 1 Chome-17-2 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan

ingredients.name: Yoyogi Station
ingredients.entityContext: Part of the film's Tokyo cityscape; the adjacent NTT Docomo Yoyogi Building (the clock-tower skyscraper) recurs in its sunrise and skyline shots.

ingredients.name: Tokyo City View
ingredients.localName: 六本木ヒルズ展望台 東京シティビュー
ingredients.address: Roppongi Hills Mori Tower, 52階, 6 Chome-10-1 Roppongi, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0032, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: One of the stops on Taki and Okudera-senpai's date; the Roppongi Hills observation deck and skyline feature in their afternoon together.

ingredients.name: SEIBU Shinjuku PePe & Brick St.
ingredients.localName: 西武新宿ペペ & Brick St.
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール
categories: ショッピング モール
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-30-1 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan

ingredients.name: Suga Shrine Otokodan
ingredients.entityContext: The staircase at Suga Shrine in Yotsuya is the film's iconic final scene — where Taki and Mitsuha pass each other, turn back, and finally ask "your name?" It is the single most-visited Your Name. pilgrimage spot.

ingredients.name: Saika Park Shinanomachi Station Bicycle Parking Area A
ingredients.localName: サイカパーク信濃町駅駐輪場Aエリア

ingredients.name: CELINE Omotesando
ingredients.address: One Omotesando, 1F, 3 Chome-5-29 Kita-Aoyama, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0061, Japan

ingredients.name: Ochiai busstop
ingredients.entityContext: Appears on the rural bus route Taki travels through the Hida countryside while searching for Itomori.

ingredients.name: Shinjuku Building
ingredients.type: ビジネス センター
categories: ビジネス センター
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-8-1 Nishishinjuku, 新宿区 Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan

ingredients.name: Shinanomachi Footbridge
ingredients.address: Shinanomachi Footbridge, 14-9 Kasumigaokamachi, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The pedestrian bridge by Shinanomachi Station where Taki desperately tries to call Mitsuha after their body-swaps abruptly stop.

ingredients.name: VIEW ALTTE Next to the ticket machine at the south exit of JR Shinjuku Station
ingredients.localName: VIEW ALTTE JR新宿駅南口券売機横
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−1

ingredients.name: Shibuya Station West Exit Pedestrian Bridge Deck
ingredients.localName: 渋谷駅西口歩道橋デッキ
ingredients.entityContext: The overpass where Taki calls Mitsuha at the 41:32 mark, and where Mitsuha later stands gathering courage to call him back at 1:13:55 — a symmetrical, emotionally charged location used twice in the film.

ingredients.name: Hida-Furukawa Station
ingredients.entityContext: Where Taki, Tsukasa, and Okudera arrive by train while searching for Mitsuha's hometown; the station exterior and platform appear almost shot-for-shot in the film.

ingredients.name: Yotsuya Station
ingredients.entityContext: Featured in Taki's Tokyo commute and as the meetup point for his date with Okudera-senpai; it is also the gateway station to the nearby Suga Shrine stairs.

ingredients.name: Near the Cafe Veloce Nishi-Shinjuku store
ingredients.localName: カフェ・ベローチェ西新宿店付近
ingredients.address: 加賀谷ビル 1F, 7 Chome-10-7 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan

ingredients.name: Nagoya Station, platforms 10 and 11
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-4 Meieki, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya, Aichi, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The platforms Taki passes through on the Hida Limited Express while travelling to find Itomori — confirmed in the film as part of his journey into the mountains of Gifu.

ingredients.name: Cafe La Boheme Shinjuku Gyoen
ingredients.localName: カフェ ラ・ボエム 新宿御苑
ingredients.address: コスモ新宿御苑ビル 1F・2F, 1 Chome-1-7 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Inspiration for the Italian restaurant "Il Giardino delle Parole," where Taki and Okudera-senpai work part-time — staff even wear uniforms like Taki's.

ingredients.name: Tofukuin-zaka
ingredients.address: 15 Chome-778 Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0981, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The quiet cobblestone slope near Suga Shrine where Mitsuha climbs searching for Taki in the final Tokyo sequence — at the top intersection a sign now marks its film fame. One of the most evocative Your Name. street locations.

ingredients.name: Tower Records Shibuya
ingredients.localName: タワーレコード 渋谷店
ingredients.entityContext: The Tower Records building that Taki walks past on the Shibuya overpass during his Tokyo scenes — part of the film's densely layered Shibuya streetscape.

ingredients.name: Hidashi Information Centre
ingredients.entityContext: The Hida tourist information center near Hida-Furukawa Station, seen as Taki asks around for clues about Mitsuha's hometown.

ingredients.name: Benkei Bridge
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-2 Motoakasaka, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0051, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The bridge near Hotel New Otani that appears in a scene of Taki walking through central Tokyo — part of the film's careful recreation of the Yotsuya/Akasaka district.

ingredients.name: Hida City Library
ingredients.entityContext: Stands in for the scene where Taki and his friends research the Itomori comet disaster and uncover the town's fate.

ingredients.name: i-Shop Ishido
ingredients.localName: アイショップ 石堂店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 2172-1 Noma, Nakatane, Kumage District, Kagoshima 891-3604, Japan

ingredients.name: Robert Indiana Sculpture: "LOVE"
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-5-1 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan

ingredients.name: The National Art Center Tokyo
ingredients.address: 7 Chome-22-2 Roppongi, Minato City, Tokyo 106-8558, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Its landmark glass façade and the "Salon de Thé Rond" café appear during Taki's date with Okudera-senpai.

ingredients.name: Ekibenya Matsuri Gransta Tokyo
ingredients.localName: 駅弁屋 祭 グランスタ東京
ingredients.address: JR Tokyo Station, 構内, 1 Chome-9-1 Marunouchi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0005, Japan

ingredients.name: Now On Cheese LUMINE Shinjuku
ingredients.localName: ナウ オン チーズ ルミネ新宿店
ingredients.type: デザート ショップ
categories: デザート ショップ
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3 Chome−38−2 ルミネ新宿店, ルミネ2 1階

ingredients.name: Meiji Jingu Gaien
ingredients.entityContext: The outer garden of Meiji Shrine whose tree-lined approach and Meiji Memorial Picture Gallery appear in the background of body-swap scenes as Mitsuha excitedly explores Tokyo in Taki's body.
